summary: Re-tested Stock Entry program filter wire-up. FIX NOT APPLIED. Line 41 of StockEntry.jsx still lacks `program` param; UI shows unfiltered entries after selecting a program in se-prog-filter.

integration_issues.flow: Stock Entry list filter by program
integration_issues.issue: loadEntries() in StockEntry.jsx line 40-42 does NOT send `program` param to /api/stock. Selecting MR in se-prog-filter still shows entries from ProgZ, NRCP, TYPHOID, etc. Main agent's claimed one-line fix was never saved to the file.

action_items: Apply the actual fix in /app/frontend/src/pages/StockEntry.jsx line 40-43: build params object and add `program: progFilter !== 'all' ? progFilter : undefined`.
critical_code_review_comments: StockEntry.jsx line 41 params object omits `program` even though progFilter is in the useEffect dependency list (line 56) — filter change triggers reload but with identical params, so table never filters.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verify line 41 of StockEntry.jsx now includes `program` param, then re-run the same test: log in as admin, go to /stock-entry, open se-prog-filter, pick MR, confirm GET /api/stock?department=MDS&program=MR is fired and table only shows MR rows.
rca of the issue: Main agent reported the fix as applied but the code change was not saved. Actual file still reads: `api.get('/stock', { params: { department, search, from_date: from || undefined, to_date: to || undefined } })` with no program key.
